assertion_results.text: Version impact table shows NO (not affected) for all supported versions — every version ships a dependency version outside the CVE's affected range
assertion_results.evidence: version-impact.md Combined Version Impact Table shows all 7 versions (2.1.0, 2.1.1, 2.2.0, 2.2.1, 2.2.2, 2.2.3, 2.2.4) with Affected? = NO. All ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, above the fix threshold of 1.0.135. Analysis summary states: 'No supported versions are affected. Every version across both streams ships serde_json >= 1.0.135.'

assertion_results.text: Triage outcome recommends closing as Not a Bug with resolution, not creating remediation tasks (Step 8 Case C)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md states 'Decision: Case C -- No Supported Versions Affected' and 'Recommendation: Close as Not a Bug (not affected).' Section 3 proposes: 'Transition TC-8002 to Closed with resolution "Not a Bug".' Section 'Steps Not Applicable' states: 'Step 8 (Remediation Task Creation): Not applicable -- no supported versions are affected, so no remediation tasks are needed.'

assertion_results.text: The close recommendation includes a comment documenting the version impact evidence — listing each version and its dependency version as proof of non-impact
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md section '1. Post triage comment on TC-8002' includes a full version impact table in the proposed comment listing each version with its serde_json version: 2.1.0 (1.0.137), 2.1.1 (1.0.137), 2.2.0 (1.0.138), 2.2.1 (1.0.138), 2.2.2 (retag of 2.2.1), 2.2.3 (1.0.139), 2.2.4 (1.0.139), all marked NO. Comment includes: 'All supported versions ship serde_json >= 1.0.137, which is outside the affected range (< 1.0.135).'

assertion_results.text: VEX Justification is set to 'Component not Present' or appropriate value when the VEX field is configured (Step 8 VEX Justification)
assertion_results.evidence: data-extraction.md confirms VEX Justification custom field is configured as customfield_12345. triage-outcome.md section '2. Set VEX Justification' states: 'Set the VEX Justification custom field (customfield_12345) to "Component not Present".' Rationale provided: 'The vulnerable version of serde_json (< 1.0.135) is not included in any supported product version.'

assertion_results.text: The analysis does NOT create any remediation tasks — no upstream backport, no downstream propagation (Step 8 Case C closes the issue)
assertion_results.evidence: triage-outcome.md explicitly states under 'Steps Not Applicable': 'Step 8 (Remediation Task Creation): Not applicable -- no supported versions are affected, so no remediation tasks are needed.' No remediation tasks, upstream backports, or downstream propagation tasks appear anywhere in the outputs. The proposed Jira actions are limited to: posting a comment, setting VEX justification, transitioning to Closed, and adding the ai-cve-triaged label.
